value.stringValue: Adjustment line has successfully been added

assignments.name: Set_Timesheet_line_rate_code_to_null
assignments.label: Set timesheet Line single - Rate Codes to null

recordLookups.description: This retrieves the timesheet ID for the user.
recordLookups.name: Get_Timesheet_ID
recordLookups.label: Get Timesheet ID

fields.name: Adjustment_Successfully_created
fields.fieldText: Positive and Negative adjustment timesheets created successfully, please close this window and mini payrolll if needed.

fields.name: Rates2
fields.fieldText:
Original Timesheet Lines

{!CurrentRates}

fields.name: Text3
fields.fieldText: New Timesheet Line

fields.name: Pay_Rate
fields.helpText: Ensure this value is above the living wage

fields.name: Charge_rate
fields.helpText: Ensure this value is larger than the Pay Rate

fields.name: Current_Timesheet_lines_0
fields.fieldText:
In order to create an adjustment please use the button below to add the Hours and Pay that the candidate should have been paid.


Charge rate is also captured but this will only be used in the email confirmation that can be provided to Invoice Queries


Once all lines are added click "Finish" to automatically create 2 new timesheets:

  • The original timesheet will automatically be deducted in a new timesheet.
  • A new positive timesheet will automatically be created using the details you provided.

Please note you will need to mini payroll these newly created timsheets if required.

fields.name: Display2
fields.fieldText:
Timesheet lines to be added:

{!Rates}


Total Hours: {!TotalHours}

Total Pay: {!TotalPay}

Total Charge: {!TotalCharge}

screens.name: Unable_to_create_Timesheet_line_error
screens.label: Unable to create Timesheet line error

fields.name: Error_screen_text
fields.fieldText:
Adjustment process could not be completed, please perform the following checks:


  • Check that your rates meet the requirements for the national minimum living wage.
  • Check the brand of the candidate matches your brand.
  • Check the timesheet has a shift associated to it before creating an adjustment.

textTemplates.name: ChargeSingleText
textTemplates.text: {!Hours} {!Rate_Code_Picklist.value} with a Charge Rate of {!Charge_rate}

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi Team,


Please see below the adjustment timesheet which has been created by the consultant:


Timesheet Number: {!Get_Timesheet_ID.IP_StandardWeeklyNumberID__c}

Client: {!Get_Timesheet_ID.sirenum__Client__r.Name}

Candidate Payroll ID: {!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.sirenum__Shift__r.sirenum__Placement__r.sirenum__Contact__r.Primary_Payroll_ID__c}

Timesheet Weekending: {!Get_Timesheet_ID.sirenum__Week_Ending__c}

Hour and Charge Rates:

{!Charge_rate_text}


Total Hours: {!TotalHours}

Total Charge: {!TotalCharge}

Adjustment Created By: {!$User.Email}

Adjustment Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}


Thanks.

textTemplates.name: RateLine
textTemplates.text: {!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.sirenum__Date__c} - {!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.sirenum__Hours__c} Hours - £{!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.sirenum__Rate__c} Pay Rate - £{!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.sirenum__Charge__c} Charge Rate - {!Loop_timesheet_lines_0.IP_TempestRateCode__c} Rate Code

textTemplates.name: RateSingleText
textTemplates.text: {!Hours} {!Rate_Code_Picklist.value} with a Pay Rate of {!Pay_Rate} and a Charge Rate of {!Charge_rate}

textTemplates.name: Subject
textTemplates.text: New adjustment created in Jobscience for {!Get_Timesheet_ID.sirenum__Client__r.Name}

variables.description: This gets the first shift ID.
variables.name: Get_Shift_ID
